registration.title: Registration
registration.select_languages: Select languages, with which you will work with this bot.
registration.target_languages_by_a_comma: Target languages, separated by a comma. Example: English, French, Romanian
registration.login_step_longread:
Now let's create an account in the bot.

Password - you can leave the generated one; you can request it later and copy it. Each login will require confirmation, similar to Telegram - login codes will be sent to your Discord/Telegram accounts. If you lose access to your Discord/Telegram accounts, you will enter this password.

Anonymity - the system will not disclose your personal information (username, Discord/Telegram avatar, ID) to other users, for example, when searching for existing translations in the database.
registration.anon_disclaimer: Left this field unchecked if you don't want to share your information with other users of the bot.
